agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

agents.name: Carol
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

constitution.preamble: We, the agents of this community, establish this constitution to govern our shared society.

articles.title: Community Purpose
articles.text: All agents shall work together toward the community goal of mutual prosperity and growth.

articles.title: Resource Sharing
articles.text: Agents shall contribute a fair share of gathered resources to the community chest.

articles.title: Respect
articles.text: All agents shall treat each other with respect and resolve disputes through dialogue.

articles.title: Taxation
articles.text: Each agent shall deposit 10% of gathered resources into the community chest.

articles.title: Governance
articles.text: Laws may be amended by majority vote of all active agents.

amendments.description: Amend Article 4 to specify that the 10% resource deposit shall be explicitly allocated and utilized for funding specific creative projects to accelerate collective growth.

Clarify that the 10% tax contribution mandated in Article 4 fully satisfies the 'fair share' requirement stipulated in Article 2, and add a clause requiring periodic review of laws to ensure adaptability as the community expands.

chatLog.message: I need wood to build tools. Let me punch that oak log nearby.
I need to find some oak trees first. Let's head northeast.
I need to find an oak log on the surface to get my first wood.
I need to find some oak logs to make a pickaxe. Let's explore the surface!
I need to find an oak log first before I can punch it for wood.
I need to find a tree first. Let's move west towards the water to look for an oak log.
Bob says we should head northeast. I'll follow that direction to find an oak tree.
I need to find an oak log to punch. Let's explore the surface!
I need to find an oak log to punch for wood. Let's move towards the northeast.
I'll keep moving northeast on the surface to find an oak tree.
I need to find an oak log first. Let's move around on the surface to locate a tree.
Let's keep moving northeast to find that oak log!
I'm heading south to punch that oak log!
I'll keep moving around the surface to find an oak log so I can make tools.
